programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: All I See is You

programme.title: A Walk To Remember

programme.title: The Mask Of Zorro
programme.desc: After twenty years as the legendary Zorro, Don Diego (Hopkins) must transform a troubled drifter (Banderas) into the fearless hero he once was.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro
programme.desc: Despite trying to keep his swashbuckling to a minimum, a threat to California's pending statehood causes the adventure-loving Alejandro de la Vega (Banderas) - and his wife, Elena (Zeta-Jones) - to take action.

The daughter sends for Kid Shelleen, the hero of several legends, only the gunfighter has become a drunkard, but she teams up with him anyway to right the unjust murder of her father.

programme.title: Killshot
programme.desc: An experienced hitman and his unhinged partner target a blue-collar couple who have entered Witness Protection

programme.title: Kill the Irishman
programme.desc: The true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: Two veteran New York City detectives hunt a vigilante who may be one of their own.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Joe Baby
programme.desc: A money collector for a private investigator is hired to track down 10 million dollars stolen in a dodgy real estate deal, opening a complex can of worms.

programme.title: Train to Busan
programme.desc: A man (Gong Yoo), his estranged daughter and other passengers become trapped on a speeding train during a zombie outbreak in South Korea.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Filmmakers showcase the dedication and struggles of kung fu stuntmen and action directors working in Hong Kong cinema during the 1960s-'80s.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: When a teenage gamer accidentally opens a portal into her favorite side-scroller, she becomes trapped in a notorious intergalactic prison, home to the galaxy's most dangerous villains. To escape, she must finish the game with a little help from her not-so-savvy friend on the outside -- or remain a 16-bit character forever.

programme.title: Enter the Fat Dragon
programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mysterious death of a suspect who was in his custody during a routine transfer.

programme.title: Cradle Did Fall
programme.desc: A woman poses as an infant photographer in order to steal a baby.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: In a search for answers, a woman uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Two women both seduced and controlled by Drew Peterson share their stories.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: Starring Aunjanue Ellis, Keke Palmer, and Sherri Shepherd.

programme.title: Abducted Off the Street: The Carlesha Gaither Story
programme.desc: Carlesha was walking home when she is forced into a car at knifepoint.

programme.title: Abducted: The Mary Stauffer Story
programme.desc: Mary Stauffer and daughter's harrowing abduction, held for seven weeks.

programme.title: The Secrets of Comfort House
programme.desc: A murder investigation in a small town focuses on Wendy Sinclair, who runs a shelter for the victims' wives.

programme.title: Secret Liaison
programme.desc: A woman travels from Los Angeles to Seattle to try to prevent her sister from going to prison for murder.

programme.title: Heart of the Manor
programme.desc: Real-estate agent Lisa competes with developer Matthew who wants to buy her family's manor.

programme.title: Just for Showmance
programme.desc: Tara marries Joe, a stranger as part of a TV show, but soon starts to fall for him after all.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Trap A Fool
programme.desc: After two years of what he thought was a perfect relationship, Jeremiah uncovers his beloved Shay-Shay's "black book" of men. He is forced to realize that her gentle nature was a facade, a calculated move in her "game of fools." Shay-Shay's only loves are herself, sex, and money, and their dangerous game is about to end.

programme.title: Played in My Face
programme.desc: Tonya’s life is almost picture perfect, and a wedding on the horizon to the man of her dreams, Victor. One night she receives an anonymous email exposing Victor at a hotel on the same night he claimed to be away on business. Her quiet suspicion spirals into obsession as she discovers that Victor’s betrayal runs deeper than she ever imagined.

programme.title: Against all Odds
programme.desc: David, a young man reeling from his brother's death and his family's financial ruin, finds himself adrift. Rejected by his father, he turns to a local criminal for quick cash, only to find himself trapped in a dangerous web of deceit and violence. Now, David must fight to escape and protect his family before it's too late. The clock is ticking, and the stakes are higher than ever.

programme.title: Trapped in the Game: Fool Me Once
programme.desc: When FBI agent Dallas Bush is assigned to take down a powerful businessman turned drug lord, he realizes the payout could cover his dying mother’s medical expenses. Dallas must navigate a dangerous web of deception, crime, and moral compromise, where every choice comes with a price.

programme.title: Money Gang Lit
programme.desc: Hakeem Benson, a down-on-his-luck videographer, is evicted and adrift. He takes a risky music video gig for Bull Dawg, a notorious kingpin. But when a respected gang member is murdered, Hakeem is falsely accused and targeted. Now, in a city on fire, he's fighting for his life and meaning amidst the chaos.

programme.title: Tiffany the Doll
programme.desc: She's the perfect partner, she can fulfill your every fantasy, and she's all yours for a price. The newest toy, Tiffany, is no ordinary sex doll, but you have to play to find out.

programme.title: 2025 Armageddon
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth using the gigantic creatures and disasters found on a B-movie TV Channel.

programme.title: Flight 666
programme.desc: Unseen spirits attack the passengers and crew of an international flight as they try to stop their killer.

programme.title: Halloween Night
programme.desc: Based on a true story, a man breaks free from an asylum on Halloween night and slaughters more victims.

programme.title: 666: The Child
programme.desc: After a couple adopts a child, people near them suffer torturous deaths. The boy is the son of Satan.

programme.title: Hansel and Gretel
programme.desc: In a modern retelling of the classic horror tale, siblings are enslaved in a gruesome house of horrors.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: The Beyond (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The seven dreaded gateways to hell are concealed in seven cursed places... And on the day the gates of hell are opened, the dead will walk the earth!From legendary Italian horror master Lucio Fulci come the ultimate classic of supernatural terror. A remote and cursed hotel, built over one of the seven gateways, becomes a yawning malevolent abyss that begins devouring both the bodies and the souls of all who enter in a graphic frenzy of gory crucifixions, chunkblowing chain-whippings, eyeball impalements, sulfuric acid meltdowns, flesh-eating tarantulas, throat-shredding demon dogs and ravenous bloodthirsty zombies. THE BEYOND is a towering achievement in hair-raising, mind-bending cinematic terror!

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Legacy Of Blood (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Elvira presents this horror thriller where a family is stalked by an unknown killer while attending the reading of a relative's will.

programme.title: Becoming Evil - Serial Killers
programme.desc: American culture and its urban settings, streets of prostitution, homeless and lost people, will continue providing the victim pool for serial killers.

programme.title: Ghosthouse
programme.desc: A group of unlikely companions receive a radio call leading to a deserted house with a grisly past. After exploring the house, the group makes the foolish decision to split up, leading to a trail of death and destruction as the house unleashes its deadly past. Along the way expect severed heads, exploding light bulbs, demonic clown dolls, and creepy children. The clown doll is the main evil force from the film; the director of a funeral home stole it out of a child's coffin to give to his own daughter, leading to angry spirits possessing both the girl and the clown doll.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Nakayamas have been torn apart. Chester searches for the person he believes can help, by any means necessary. An outbreak in the community forces Amy to act, though she's caught between doing what she's told and doing what's right.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester and Luz have reached a turning point in their relationship. Amy must take matters into her own hands as she's tormented by a powerful nemesis. Chester meets a boy who gives him answers.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Terminal Islanders return home to find that things have changed since they left. The Nakayamas, still tense from the pain they've inflicted on one another, must come together to battle the spirit that threatens their future.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Henry and Asako look to the past to provide answers to their current turmoil. Chester and Luz grapple with their identities in hopes of saving those who are dearest to them. Amy and Yamato-san struggle to once again assimilate into American life.

programme.title: Wildling
programme.desc: Anna's teen years take on a terrifying twist when she realizes the monster she feared as a child may be all too real. Liv Tyler, Brad Dourif and Bel Powley star.

programme.title: At the Devil's Door
programme.desc: A demonic entity terrorizes a group of young women while seeking a body to call home in this supernatural horror thriller. Co-starring Naya Rivera and Ashley Rickards.

programme.title: Mon Mon Mon Monsters
programme.desc: A group of boys discover two flesh-eating creatures. One of the creatures is able to get away, but they capture the other one. They soon realize letting the first one escape was a mistake.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

Errol Flynn (The Adventures of Robin Hood) stars as Stuart, with Olivia de Havilland as his romantic interest (the seventh of nine times they were paired together by Warner Bros.) The cast includes Ronald Reagan as General George Custer, and Raymond Massey as John Brown, with such familiar faces as Alan Hale and Van Hefflin in supporting roles. Filmed partly in Santa Fe!

First, hes Slim Braddock, a miner who turns to robbing stagecoaches after being swindled by a banker. When Slim is murdered, his son Tim, also played by McCoy, seeks vengeance. Directed by B-movie legend Sam Newfield for Excelsior Pictures, this film is a showcase for McCoy, who appeared in more than 90 movies and in 1960 earned a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame!

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: In Stomping Grounds Episode 5, our crew follows the road all the way down to where it ends on the tropical sun-baked island of Key West at the southern tip of the Florida Keys. Surrounded by water, Key West is a boater's paradise with historic seaports and marinas offering a bustling waterfront with historic schooners, dive boats, sport fishing charters, parasailing adventures and scenic coastal excursions. Host Ryan McVinney hops aboard a custom hybrid diesel-electric power catamaran with solar panels, called "Squid" for an in-depth eco-tour of Key West National Wildlife Refuge, including snorkeling in a sponge garden with tropical fish. Next a quick stop in Dry Tortugas National Park via the 110-foot Gladding Hearn power catamaran the "Yankee Freedom III" to visit historic Fort Jefferson, then we jump on a 2020 Sea Hunt 255 Ultra for a ride through the dolphin playground to a secret local boating spot known as Snipe Keys with pristine white sandbars. Back in town we we board the Nau Santa Maria - a replica of Christopher Columbus' sailboat. Finally we head 50 miles offshore to ply the wakes of the shrimp boats with fishing charter captain Chris Trosset aboard his Contender 35ST center console boat.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly earns his Gay Soup Diet credentials by making a hearty Chickpea and Ditalini Pasta Soup that he insists is both deeply comforting and genuinely slimming for January. Michael Symon and Carla Hall join in for a lively episode about winter blues, childhood thermostat disputes, and the surprisingly emotional power of a good bowl of soup.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon elevates the humble chicken tender by using a feta brine to infuse the meat with tangy, salty flavor before breading and shallow-frying to golden perfection. He finishes the dish with a bold hot honey sauce made with Calabrian chili, creating an indulgent yet sophisticated take on a crowd-pleasing classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall tackles a Fan Fridge from a viewer in Ohio, transforming ground beef, mashed potatoes, and pantry staples into a warming Shepherd's Pie-inspired casserole layered with sautÈed vegetables and finished with a cheesy potato topping. The hosts weave in a thoughtful conversation about grace, kindness to strangers, and the community spirit of how neighborhoods once raised children together.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon each take a third of the same chocolate sheet cake and decorate it their own way, creating three wildly different showstopping desserts in one episode. Clinton goes peanut butter, Carla goes Black Forest-inspired with sour cherry, and Michael goes coconut ganache ó proving that one bake can launch a thousand creative directions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his beloved Mini Marsala Meatballs, mixing beef and pork with breadcrumbs soaked in milk and browning them until golden before finishing them in a rich marsala-mushroom sauce. The hosts discuss proper meatball technique, family traditions around Sunday gravy, and the surprising versatility of marsala wine in savory cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall takes the lead in the kitchen as she introduces a playful and unexpected dish: fried Kool-Aid, inspired by nostalgic state fair treats from her childhood. As she walks through the process of making the vibrant red dough using Kool-Aid powder, flour, sugar, and a leavening agent, Clinton Kelly reacts with skepticism while Michael Symon shares his own less-than-great experience trying the dish at a fair. The conversation quickly turns humorous as Carla recounts a bizarre childhood memory of having a runny nose at the fair, prompting playful teasing from the group. As the dough is fried into donut hole-like bites, the hosts discuss technique, including how the dough naturally flips in hot oil and how to tell when it’s perfectly cooked. Carla elevates the dish by tossing the warm bites in lemon sugar and offering a Kool-Aid glaze for dipping, balancing sweetness with a bright citrus note. Once tasted, both Clinton and Michael are pleasantly surprised, praising the light texture and more refined flavor compared to traditional fair versions. The episode transitions into a lively fan mail segment where the hosts debate their least favorite vegetables and share personal preferences, followed by a special “fan of the day” moment celebrating a crew member’s mother’s birthday with jokes and a spontaneous song from Clinton. The episode wraps with the hosts encouraging viewers to engage with the show and teasing future fun.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall makes a warmly spiced Moroccan Apple Crumble with dates, cardamom, and cinnamon, building a simple crumble topping using a foolproof ratio formula and serving it with a dollop of cr√ãme fra√ìche for an elegant finish. The hosts discuss the art of checking doneness by eye rather than timer, date farming in California, and Carla's personal decision to embrace her natural gray hair.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Bean Week with her Black Bean Empanadas, stuffing golden, flaky pastry shells with a richly seasoned black bean filling that proves legumes can be just as craveable as meat. The hosts celebrate the internet's enthusiastic response to Clinton's Bean Week proposal and dive into the week with maximum enthusiasm.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his deeply satisfying Pasta e Fagioli during Bean Week, building a thick, soul-warming pasta and bean soup that he considers one of the greatest cold-weather dishes ever conceived. The hosts debate the pronunciation of Italian words in Italian-American households and celebrate the cultural heritage behind this Roman classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Crispy Pork Belly Revisited" - The journey to Cantonese-style roasted pork belly continues. This time Chris is trying a longer drying time in the fridge to see if that gets him closer to crisp skin. We’ll see…

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Sweet and Sour Pork Ribs" - Chris works his way through "Wayne" aka @FoodieChina888's sweet and sour pork ribs, reminiscent of what he frequently cooks for his kids.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Eggs Jambalaya" - Rachel, Chris, and Bryan tackle a fan-submitted recipe for “eggs jambalaya,” which, spoiler alert, bears little resemblance to authentic jambalaya, but we’re not complaining.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Recipe Club: Wonder Bread: A Trashy Version of Eggplant Parm" - An American icon gets a (vaguely) Italian treatment.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes an Italian Sunday dinner of braciole and red sauce for "Cousin Sal" Iacono, sports gambling enthusiast and prankster. Dave also surprises Sal with two dishes that he didn't make, including his favorite sandwich in Los Angeles. The duo discusses a buffet's worth of topics, from GLP-1s to sandwiches, sports betting to why Vegas is struggling, and hot dog eating contests. They finish with a game of Inappropriate Dinner Conversations, which gets a little NSFW and a lot character-revealing.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave made a special gumbo recipe for a guest...but got a different guest than he bargained for, and one he knows very well. He and his new guest talk off-the-cuff about the differences between jambalaya and gumbo, how New Orleans has the most distinct food culture in any US city, and debate which city best represents the food of the South, all while acknowledging a lack of expertise. They finish with a quick Atlas of where to eat in New Orleans.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Spring is here, and so is a special bunny who comes into our lives bearing deliciousness and joy: Chris Ying with a new Easter episode of Recipe Club. In this episode, our Club members brought an Easter feast. Nico de Leon, chef at Lasita, brings the lechon his restaurant is known for. LA Times writer and journalist Gustavo Arellano brings his family’s recipe for zacatecas-style capirotada. And none other than Chris’ wife, Jami Witek, manager at Zero Footprint, brings potatoes in the form of gratin dauphinois.Let’s hop to it and find out whose recipe is the best for Easter.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: What a lovely night for some hors d'oeuvres. At our swanky Recipe Club cocktail party, chef David Chang makes some Swedish Meatballs. Chef Courtney McBroom joins and brings her hometown-inspired, Texas-Style Smoked Brisket Nachos. Jared, executive producer of Dinner Time Live, brings his famous Stuffed Mushrooms. Now this is our kind of party! Stay for some bites and to find out which is the best Cocktail Party recipe.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: C is for Cookie, and RC is for Recipe Club! We had our friends bring cookies to swap, taste, and debate. Baker Nicole Rucker brought a cookie game-changer: Jacques Torres’ Famous Chocolate Chip Cookie. She traded with podcasting legend Hrishikesh Hirway, who brought a Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Coconut Pecan Cookie. Baker Jennifer Yee brings her own White Lotus cookie to swap. For whom will C stand for Champion? Tune in and find out the best cookie recipe!

programme.desc: Pati tours Mexico City’s changing skyline on the Iztapalapa Cable Bus, builds a bamboo bike at Bamboocycles, and enjoys tacos and tlacoyos, exploring how design, transit, and creativity shape a sustainable, connected city.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores Mercado de Jamaica’s colorful stalls with photographer Nuria Lagarde, then visits author Laura Esquivel to share stories, pan dulce, and chocolate, reflecting on how art and identity shape Mexico City’s creative spirit.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Tlatelolco’s Gris with Gabriela Rojas to reflect on tragedy and hope, then learns danzón at Salón Los Ángeles with Miguel Nieto. With friends, they share chamorro de cerdo and toast resilience with creative micheladas.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Milpa Alta to harvest and char nopales with Chef Jorge Córcega, then joins Luis Alvarado’s family for their storied mole. Over a shared meal, they celebrate how tradition and flavor nourish the community.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Rústico in Cuauhtémoc for pastries with Iván and Germán Ortiz, then explores dreams and creativity at Casa Morgana in Roma with Kiren Miret. Tart, ice cream, and heartfelt stories celebrate passion and tradition.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores her Jewish roots with historian Mónica Unikel-Fasja, visiting historic sites in Mexico City. At Niddo, she cooks and reminisces with her sister, celebrating family, identity, and stories that shape a life.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Coffee expert Joey Chase goes on a pilgrimage along an ancient Ethiopian trading route that starts with the modern latte art cafes in Addis Ababa, then through the coffee kingdom of Jimma to the 10,000+-year-old wild coffee Yayu Forest. Village elders share the age-old secrets of hand processing, fire-pit roasting, and brewing of beans followed by a traditional feast.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: After sharing a first-ever taste of coffee in a remote Maasai village, followed by an exploration of the terrain with some new-found friends, Joey explores a grandiose coffee estate in Mt. Kenya. He then jousts with coffee buyers in Nairbobi's auction house and experiences the hand sorting and elaborate tasting of over 100 distinctive coffees in a British Tudor-style plantation cottage.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Touting the practicality of gondola travel, Joey explores the canals of Venice and discovers the oldest coffee shop in Europe. The trail to classic Italian espresso leads from Illy Coffee near the high-fashion metropolis of Trieste to the medieval town of Scarperia where espresso machines are manufactured. Florence boasts a famous barista who prepares a masterful farewell espresso.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: An exploration of Paris's distinctive cafe culture reveals a renaissance of coffee-inspired cuisine, pastries, and spirits. World-renowned "Noses" in the south of France reveal the complex contribution that fragrance and aroma make toward the perfect cup as Joey pursues the development of a coffee perfume.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Bob Marley's son Rohan takes Joey on a journey from the streets of Kingston to the peaks of the Blue Mountains. From waterfall plunges and grazing tropical fruits on Rohan's farm to roasting the smoothest coffee on earth and enjoying a Jamaican feast that ends with a Marley-hosted jam session, Joey discovers the pulse of Jamaica through the lens of Marley Coffee.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: From four-star cuisine to cappuccino on horseback, Joey explores the historic cobblestone streets and coffee estates of Antigua. A puddle jumper flight along the rims of active volcanoes leads to the age-old Mayan towns around Lake Atitlan where coffee-harvesting communities offer a glimpse of ancient traditions.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: The pursuit of the sweetest "honey" coffees on earth unleashes an adventure that includes "coffee monkeys", crocodiles, toucans, an exploration of the active crater of Volcan Poas, and surfing on the coast with a coffee farmer. The Costa Rican paradise reveals a uniquely artistic approach toward colorful honey coffees stored like wine and served just in time for a classic "coffee sock" brew.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey hits the streets of Bogota to check out the controversial trade in emeralds, the famous Juan Valdez Cafe, and some classic Colombian cuisine at an elevation of 10,000 feet. A flight to Armenia and subsequent Willy's Jeep trek uncover a remote and hidden world of quaint coffee towns and boutique farms where Joey hosts a group of international coffee buyers.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey is welcomed to Sao Paulo with a freshly brewed cup of excellence at The Coffee Lab in the trendy Madalena district. Joey checks out big coffee exporting in the Port of Santos with shipping containers stacked like legos, Jaco bird coffee (foraged from bird poop), and the world's largest savannah grassland, where Daterra Coffee Farms researches small-lot coffees on a massive scale.

programme.title: How to Live in a Van
programme.desc: Interviews with 11 different Van dwellers about what it takes to live full-time in a Van. Answering all the biggest questions like "Where to park?" and "How do you go to the bathroom?" but not stopping at the simple answers and actually showing what it is like to live in a van day-to-day. Learn how they have overcome challenges with the hopes of helping you figure out how to live in a van.

programme.title: Homesteading
programme.desc: Ever wondered what it would take to homestead? Follow four homesteaders as they talk about their journeys towards self-sufficiency in the modern day. From three years of experience to thirty, from a farm with animals to a vegan gardener, every homestead is different and in this film we explore what it takes to live off the land.

programme.title: Homesteading
programme.desc: Ever wondered what it would take to homestead? Follow four homesteaders as they talk about their journeys towards self-sufficiency in the modern day. From three years of experience to thirty, from a farm with animals to a vegan gardener, every homestead is different and in this film we explore what it takes to live off the land.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Sarah and her cat Bodhi have lived in a van for the past two years in western Canada. She gives us a full tour of her classic camper van. Sarah also shares her personal experience about what Vanlife is like for her and why she chose the van that she did.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Electrician builds out a 4x4 sprinter into a modern camper that they are able to both live in and work mobile. This build is done with aluminum and pvc boards, has solar, a composting toilet and everything they need to live comfortably. They also share insights from life on the road.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Virginia lives in her van full-time. She has been traveling North America in her Ford Transit that she designed herself and helped mostly DIY'ers build. Virginia wasn't sure what she was going to do with her retirement until she learned about van life and decided that designing and building out a van to travel and live in was her next creative project.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: John worked with professional van builders to create his high tech sprinter van conversion, equipped with a tiltable solar array, lithium batteries and everything he needs to be a digital nomad and travel in northern Canada. He gives us a tour through his tiny home on wheels and shares what Vanlife means to him.

programme.title: How to Live in a Van
programme.desc: Interviews with 11 different Van dwellers about what it takes to live full-time in a Van. Answering all the biggest questions like "Where to park?" and "How do you go to the bathroom?" but not stopping at the simple answers and actually showing what it is like to live in a van day-to-day. Learn how they have overcome challenges with the hopes of helping you figure out how to live in a van.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The O'Kane family's patience is truly tested during a complete to-the-studs kitchen renovation. Homeowner Yvonne starts to get impatient to feed her family home cooked dinners. Added pressure: another fireplace to deal with, uneven floors, custom cabinets and an uncovered secret staircase. (All that plus a new puppy.) Thanks to Mar's 6 design principles this custom space is unique and stunning.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It's 'Lost in Space' because somehow these home makeover clips never made it to Mar's! Bloopers Alert! Unseen Tips Alert! Inspired by viewer feedback, an entire show that includes highlights of the greatest gaffs, goofs and guffaws. Plus, some renovation and makeover projects never before aired.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Ever dream of renting a space with a kitchen in Mexico just to cook all the fresh fish you can eat? Rick lives the dream at Hotel Villas Carrizalillo in Puerto Escondido. With few culinary tools, and fresh ingredients, it is time to feast.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: When you say the word "enchiladas," chances are you are thinking about the saucy, cheesy affairs we all know and love. In Mexico City, you will find a variety of enchiladas, both in the simplest of markets and in the nicest of restaurants.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: There is magic in the charming Baja town of Todos Santos. It all starts at the roadside bar Art and Beer. Then Rick checks into the Hotel California before meeting with Sergio Jaurequi, as well as Chefs DoÃ±a Ramona and Dany Lamote.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Rick takes us on a remarkable journey through Oaxaca City during the revered Dia de Los Muertos (Day of the Dead) holiday. Much preparation for the celebration takes place in October, and Rick gives us an insider's look at the fiesta.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Chef Edgar Nunez wants to change the world. Like Rick, Edgar believes everyone should have access to fresh, local food, that Mexican chefs should embrace their own cuisine, and that mentoring the younger generation is very important.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: By now the secret is out: Rick has a sweet tooth. When Rick travels to Mexico, he is on the prowl for it all, from ripe fruit to homemade candies to luscious pies. Rick will also share his personal Caramelized Papaya with Mexican Cheese.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Deep in the Sian Ka'an nature reserve is a remote village named Punta Allen, Rick and Chef Juan Pablo join a team representing the local sustainable lobster fishing cooperative for an afternoon at sea. The day's catch? A Caribbean lobster.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Ever travel to a tourist mecca and wonder what the locals eat? Join Rick and his friend Hugo to find the best Mexican food in Los Cabos. First stop is the municipal market in San Jose del Cabo, then they enjoy carnitas at Los Michoacanos.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Rick cannot resist the kind of well-seasoned, simple food grilled over a live fire that he has enjoyed at thousands of markets, kitchens, and restaurants all over Mexico where cooking comes down to fresh ingredients and flickering flames.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Mescal is experiencing a renaissance in Mexico and throughout the United States. Journey with Rick to witness firsthand how an Oaxacan distiller handcrafts this fine spirit renowned for its rich, smoky complexity and brightness.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: In the Yucatan, cooking over fire is a way of life, and Chefs Juan Pablo Loza, Federico Lopez, and Eric Werner demonstrate their mastery cooking with flame. Back at Lena Brava in Chicago, Rick prepares spatchcock chicken al oregano.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: We find Rick and his daughter, Lanie, at Mexico City's colorful Sonora Market, an emporium of medicinal herbs and the best place to buy cazuelas. They also check out El Guero, an institution in Mexico City popularly known as "Tacos Hola!"

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: "You are what you eat." Brillat Savarin's statement fuels Rick's tour of the 21 de Noviembre market in downtown Oaxaca. We uncover the incredibly rich culture of the market and its role in the daily lives and meals of the local population.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: To celebrate a friend's birthday, Rick reinvents the ice cream social where everyone brings a batch of homemade ice cream. Inspired by the infinitely varied frozen treats and sweets of Mexico, Rick prepares three fresh takes of his own.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Tacos al Pastor are Mexico City's most iconic taco, all red chile-marinated pork roasting slowly on a vertical spit and sliced with glistening pineapple into a warm corn tortilla.

programme.title: Chisum
programme.desc: Kind-hearted, fatherly John Chisum (John Wayne) owns a large ranch in Lincoln County, New Mexico, in the 1870s. With the help of his faithful sidekick, Pepper (Ben Johnson), and a hot-headed young ranch hand nicknamed Billy the Kid (Geoffrey Deuel), Chisum does battle with underhanded land developer Lawrence Murphy (Forrest Tucker). Having bought up most of the nearby town and appointed his own corrupt sheriff (Bruce Cabot), Murphy now has his eye on Chisum's ranch.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Wings and crew land World Aircraft at World Airport for a day of cleaning their ship. When the Super Pets cause chaos, Storm's sister volunteers to take care of the SPs for the day. Jett delivers a special, hi-tech steering wheel to a girl, Nailah, in Cairo, Egypt. It's for her race quad, Pepper, for an off-road race over the Sahara Desert. Trouble arises when Golden Boy appears.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a bug shaped safari suit to a boy named Adrian in La Fortuna, Costa Rica! It's a big day as Adrian is going to lead his friends on a bug safari located on his parents' zip line course. Jett and Jett Pet deliver a teddy bear to a girl named Rachel who lost her favorite teddy bear, Ute. With Astra and A.P.'s help, they must then enter Rachel's dream, and find Ute in Dreamland Station.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a special child minder wrist link to Yeojun, a young Korean boy, so he can look after his younger brother Yeowoon as they follow their dad to a big TV studio on 'take your kids to work day'. Jett and Jett Pet are called to Pilsen, in the Czech Republic to deliver a marionette for the town's Historical Weekend Festival. But Golden Boy ends up getting caught in a giant Golem puppet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers some special movie making equipment to a boy named Riley who's visiting an alien themed festival in Argentina. Golden Boy winds up telling Riley that he's a real alien. Jett delivers a white dress to a girl named Bhanu in Varanasi, India to wear to a birthday party. But they discover it's the Holi Festival that day. Jett offers to escort Bhanu to help keep her white dress clean.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet are called to Dunedin, New Zealand, to help a boy and his new friend collect a trailer's worth of furniture that's rolled down the world's steepest street! Jett delivers a robotic Piggy Bank to a boy, Lorenzo, in Rome, Italy. The bank (Piggy B) can smell coins and put them in its own slot. Trouble occurs when Piggy B tries to collect every coin in the Trevi Fountain.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet go to Zhangjiajie, China to help a boy bring a gift to a legendary dragon so he can make a wish. Golden Boy steals the boy's gift for the dragon so he can use it to make his own wish. Jett delivers a wool hat and gloves to a girl, Trisha, in St. John's, Newfoundland, Canada. She's been hoping for snow, but there hasn't been a cloud in the sky for awhile.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet deliver special envelopes that can go underwater to a girl named Chay. She lives in Vanuatu and wants to invite all her friends to her birthday party on the beach. Jett brings Jimbo's Mom to World Aircraft for a Mother's Day visit and then sets off to deliver a package of flowers to a girl named Grace in Australia. On the way, he is intercepted by Golden Boy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy living in Austria named Lukas asks Jett to deliver a wagon that is big enough to carry a large aquarium so he can take his pet catfish with him to the local water park. But the fish is mistaken for a shark! Jett delivers a toy to a boy for his pet hamster - a wheel for it to run in that lights up and plays music. The hamster accidentally runs through a device that makes it huge.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl named Selena in Uruguay has lost her first tooth. She's going to put it in a special tooth box that Jett delivers and it's going to go under her pillow for Perez the Mouse. A young boy living in Finland named Petrie asks Jett to deliver a heavy metal wig for his Dad. Petrie wants his dad to perform as a surprise. But the wig flies off and causes a blackout at the concert venue.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl named Selena in Uruguay has lost her first tooth. She's going to put it in a special tooth box that Jett delivers and it's going to go under her pillow for Perez the Mouse. A young boy living in Finland named Petrie asks Jett to deliver a heavy metal wig for his Dad. Petrie wants his dad to perform as a surprise. But the wig flies off and causes a blackout at the concert venue.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Toronto, Canada to deliver a knapsack to Kamili, but it turns out the bag isn't for him. It's for his cousin Amon in Tanzania. Kamili's internet friends around the world want to contribute too. Jett delivers an incubator to a girl named Nambayar in Mongolia who has found a big egg. The egg hatches into a baby dinosaur! Jett uses a time machine to try and find the baby's mom.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers an incubator to a girl named Nambayar in Mongolia who has found a big egg. The egg hatches into a baby dinosaur! Jett uses a time machine to try and find the baby's mom. While playing at World Aircraft, the Super Pets accidentally damage a new satellite dish. Jett delivers a robot puppy to a little girl named Lien in Singapore. But Lien wanted a real puppy, not a robot.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Victor orders a "Travel The World" holographic board game from the Super Wings. When Golden Boy decides to play, and win at any cost. Jett delivers a cardboard playhouse kit to twin sisters, Fatima and Peri in Baku, Azerbaijan. Trouble arises when the competitive sisters try to put all their toys in the playhouse and it rips open.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Jett Pet deliver special farmer's outfit to a girl named Greta who lives in Germany. Greta is very excited to make friends with the animals on her grandfather's farm but the animals escape their enclosure. Jett delivers some mini camper vans to Princess Maribelle in England. Maribelle wants to take her puppies with her on a camping trip. But the group is chased by a bear in the woods.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a firefighter's suit to a girl named Lydia whose Mom is a firefighter in the Amazon Rainforest. When a real fire emergency happens, the Super Wings and Lydia must upgrade into World Guardian mode to save the rainforest and its animals. Jett flies to Moscow, Russia and delivers a special steamer to a girl named Sasha. She wants to use the steamer to make pelmeni, a Russian dumpling.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Joy lives in Kenya. Some wild animals from the national park escaped and they are making mayhem in the village! A boy and his Dad in Gwangju Korea need to get a giant watermelon they've grown on their farm in the mountains to a contest in town. Jett delivers a giant slide to help, but the watermelon bounces out of the slide and causes a calamity, knocking over some rare rocks.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: As a tornado bears down on Turkey's Iztuzu Beach, Sevgi wants to bury sand nest for the endangered Loggerhead turtle eggs and save them from the wind. So Jett delivers her a set of digging tools. Jett flies to Sainte-Marguerite Island and delivers an inflatable boat to a boy named Emile. Emile needs the boat to bring a giant robot statue that he made out of lemons to be a float in a parade.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When Grand Albert loses his camera that has the ability to make things bigger or smaller it's found by a girl in Egypt who is babysitting her baby brother. The camera turns him into a giant baby. A boy, Henri, is given a riding toy truck by his goofball Dad. When it gets dirt, Jett brings a Car Wash Kit to them and together they wash all the dirty cars/trucks in town.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language along with your favorite Baby Einstein Characters! Learn how to sign the names of common things from different objects found at home and outside, family, and even your very own neighborhood through repetition and narration. Real-life images of toys and objects along with gentle melodies engage viewers as they learn a variety of different signs.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Five Little Ducks Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Five Little Duck, Bingo The Dog, Incy Wincy Spider and many more Boom Buddies rhymes! Happy singing!

programme.title: Nursery Rhymes for Children + More Kids Song - Jelly Bears
programme.desc: Join Jelly Bears as they dance to preschool rhymes like Five Little Teddy Bears, Johny Johny and more!

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Nursery Rhymes - Super Supremes
programme.desc: Let's explore the ocean with Baby Shark! Enjoy popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers. Super supremes is a kids tv show where you can learn more baby songs like swimming song, bath song, five little babies, finger family, twinkle twinkle little star, johny johny yes papa, peek a boo, this is the way, daddy's red car, the muffin man, wheels on the bus and kids songs.

programme.title: Super Supremes Wheels On The Bus & More Popular Kids Song
programme.desc: Do you kids know Wheels on the Bus? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with The Supremes, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Booya Non-Stop
programme.desc: Follow the hilarious adventures of five adorable kooky monsters who live under a kid's bed. Living under the bed is easy and kind of safe but these adorable characters are impulsive, curious, and always ready for fun adventures. With a playful dog who is bent on messing up their plans, the group keeps venturing out, finding ways to dodge the snoopy sniffy, creating chaos and laughter around them.

programme.title: Baby Shark + More Baby Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Let's groove to the Baby Shark Song !! Kids songs and nursery rhymes that the little ones will love. Come join Farmees as they sing along and dance to these kids rhymes like animal sound song, ten in the bed, five little ducks, Incy wincy spider, five little speckled frogs, humpty dumpty, jack and jill, rig a jig jig, miss polly had a dolly, the muffin man, phonics song and many more baby songs.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad.
